title.zh: Polkit CVE-2021-3560 本地提权漏洞复现
title.en: Polkit CVE-2021-3560 Local Privilege Escalation Reproduction

description.zh: 利用 Polkit 在 dbus-send 认证完成前强制终止引发的错误，绕过身份验证，创建具有 sudo 权限的用户。
description.en: Exploit the error in Polkit when dbus-send is terminated before authentication completes, bypassing authentication and creating a sudo-privileged user.

content.zh: 检查系统是否使用 Systemd 和 Polkit（默认 Ubuntu 20.04）
content.en: Check if the system uses Systemd and Polkit (default on Ubuntu 20.04)

annotation.zh: 执行：ps aux | grep polkit 或 systemctl status polkit
annotation.en: Run: ps aux | grep polkit or systemctl status polkit

content.zh: 确认 dbus 服务处于 active 状态

annotation.zh: 执行：/etc/init.d/dbus status 或 systemctl status dbus
annotation.en: Run: /etc/init.d/dbus status or systemctl status dbus

annotation.zh: 漏洞利用需要 polkit 与 dbus 交互
annotation.en: Exploit requires interaction between polkit and dbus

content.zh:
下载漏洞利用脚本：
bash polkit-CVE-2021-3560.sh <username> <password>

脚本执行过程：
1. 构造 dbus-send 请求添加用户
2. 在认证完成前通过延时 kill 掉 dbus-send 进程
3. 触发 polkit 错误处理不当
content.en:
Script execution:
1. Construct dbus-send request to add user
2. Kill dbus-send process before authentication completes via delay
3. Trigger improper error handling in polkit

annotation.zh: 关键点：kill 时机需要精确调整（毫秒级延时）
annotation.en: Key point: kill timing needs precise adjustment (millisecond delay)

content.zh:
成功执行后，输出：
[+] User 'testuser' added successfully with password 'pass123'
content.en:
After successful execution, output:
[+] User 'testuser' added successfully with password 'pass123'

annotation.zh: 可能需要多次运行并调整延迟参数
annotation.en: May need multiple runs and adjust delay parameter

content.zh:
验证新创建的用户是否具有 sudo 权限：
sudo -i -u testuser
sudo whoami
content.en:
Verify that the newly created user has sudo privileges:
sudo -i -u testuser
sudo whoami

content.zh:
漏洞原理总结：
- Polkit 在调用 polkit_system_bus_name_get_creds_sync 时未检查错误状态
- 当 dbus-send 被提前终止，返回的 uid 为 0（root），从而绕过认证
- 非特权用户可利用此漏洞添加任意管理员账户
content.en:
Vulnerability summary:
- Polkit does not check error status in polkit_system_bus_name_get_creds_sync
- When dbus-send is terminated early, the returned uid is 0 (root), bypassing authentication
- Unprivileged users can add arbitrary administrator accounts

annotation.zh: 参考：GitHub Blog 和 Kevin Backhouse 的分析
annotation.en: References: GitHub Blog and Kevin Backhouse's analysis
